summary: Comprehensive testing of Monte Verde Interactive Digital Invitation website completed. Backend APIs fully functional (100% success rate), frontend UI working excellently with all required features, WhatsApp and Maps integrations working correctly, mobile responsive design validated.

design_issues.issue: Video element has no src attribute detected in testing, though video background displays correctly

passed_tests: ✅ Backend API /api/event returns correct event data
✅ Backend API /api/rsvp POST creates RSVPs successfully
✅ Backend API /api/rsvps GET returns RSVP list
✅ Hero section loads with video background and logo
✅ Hero title displays correct Portuguese text
✅ Details section shows correct date (21), month (Março), time (15h)
✅ Details section shows correct location (Fazenda da Mata, Monte Verde)
✅ WhatsApp button links to wa.me/5535991232422 with pre-filled message
✅ Maps button links to Google Maps with coordinates
✅ Footer logo and text 'Complexo Imobiliário e Turístico Monte Verde' visible
✅ Mobile responsive design working (430px width tested)
✅ All buttons clickable with proper hover effects
